 {"id":"bd-1b8k","title":"E2E: policy guardrails (rate limit, blast radius, max kills)","description":"## Goal
Validate safety guardrails end-to-end with detailed JSONL logging.

## Scope
- Rate limiting: per-minute/hour/session counters, cooldown warnings, and hard blocks.
- Blast radius warnings: ensure high-impact actions require explicit confirmation paths.
- Max kills per session: verify guardrail enforcement in plan/apply.
- Negative paths: malformed policy.json, missing policy file, override attempts logged.
- Validate exit codes and user-facing error messages are clear and actionable.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs: event, cmd, guardrail_type, threshold, observed, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: plan outputs, apply outputs (dry-run), stderr snapshots, manifest.
- Log redaction checks (no secrets/path leakage).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Guardrails are enforced in plan/apply flows.
- [ ] Warnings and blocks are surfaced clearly to users.
- [ ] Override attempts are logged with explicit user intent markers.
- [ ] Error paths produce correct exit codes and guidance.
- [ ] JSONL logs + artifact manifests validate.

## Test Plan
- E2E script using shared harness + fixtures: run `pt agent plan/apply --dry-run` against crafted inputs.

 {"id":"bd-1ncg","title":"Dynamic re-optimization for changing process sets","description":"Implement re-optimization when candidate set changes (process exits/appears). Include tests for plan updates and stability under churn.","notes":"Implemented reoptimize_on_change in crates/pt-core/src/decision/goal_optimizer.rs (detects candidate churn, missing selected IDs, and reoptimizes via ILP/greedy). Added tests in crates/pt-core/tests/goal_optimization_tests.rs for no-change, selected-missing, and churn-threshold behavior. Ran cargo test -p pt-core --test goal_optimization_tests.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-04T07:57:44.096079805Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-04T08:13:51.392518169Z","closed_at":"2026-02-04T08:13:51.392437198Z","close_reason":"Implemented reoptimize_on_change + tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1ncg","depends_on_id":"process_triage-uiq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T07:57:44.107805055Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"bd-1nmm","title":"Implement downstream publication automation for Winget/Windows packaging","description":"Follow-up to process_triage-fqr after adding optional Winget manifest generation.

Scope:
- Publish generated Winget manifests to the Windows Package Manager community repo (or dedicated packaging repo flow).
- Add release-time validation against actual Windows release assets (x64 required, arm64 optional).
- Add CI/docs for Windows packaging ownership and token requirements.
- Evaluate/track Chocolatey/winget parity decisions for native Windows install path.

Acceptance:
- Automated and documented publish path for Winget manifests.
- CI validation gate for Windows packaging artifacts.
- README/docs updated for native Windows packaging status.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:26:03.124245885Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T17:26:03.797415538Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1nmm","depends_on_id":"process_triage-fqr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T17:26:03.797365876Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1o51","title":"E2E: output formatting modes (fields/compact/TOON/truncation)","description":"## Goal
Validate CLI output-mode behavior end-to-end with detailed JSONL logs + manifests.

## Scope
- `pt agent plan --fields minimal|standard|full` validation.
- `--compact` + `--format toon/json` output validation.
- `--max-tokens` truncation + continuation token resume.
- Negative paths: invalid fields, invalid continuation tokens, invalid format.
- Validate exit codes and user-facing error messages are clear and actionable.
- Consume goldens/fixtures produced by bd-1v91 + bd-z3ma.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs: event, cmd, exit_code, token_count, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: raw outputs, schema validation reports, stderr snapshots, manifest.
- Log redaction checks (no secrets/path leakage).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Output modes validated against schema and deterministic ordering.
- [ ] Truncation + continuation behaviors verified.
- [ ] Invalid inputs fail with clear errors + correct exit codes.
- [ ] JSONL logs + artifact manifests validate.

## Test Plan
- E2E script via shared harness and fixtures.

All 21 tests pass.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1o51","depends_on_id":"bd-1v91","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:07:45.634353014Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o51","depends_on_id":"bd-3p7w","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:05:41.017965436Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o51","depends_on_id":"bd-jg2d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:05:50.671291797Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o51","depends_on_id":"bd-z3ma","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:19:45.680684344Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o51","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:05:48.915496280Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-1o51","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:05:47.103647652Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1rf2","title":"E2E: session diff + compare workflows","description":"## Goal
Exercise session diff/compare paths end-to-end with JSONL logs and negative-path validation.

## Scope
- `pt diff --last` on two sessions from fixtures.
- `pt agent diff` with JSON output verification.
- Failure paths: missing session, invalid session id, schema mismatch.
- Validate exit codes and user-facing error messages.
- Validate diff summary fields and delta counts.

## Logging & Artifacts
- JSONL logs with command, session_ids, delta_summary, duration_ms, artifacts[].
- Artifacts: diff outputs (json + human), validation report, stderr snapshots.
- Log redaction checks (no secrets/path leakage).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Diff outputs schema-validate and are deterministic.
- [ ] Failure paths produce clear errors + correct exit codes.
- [ ] JSONL logs emitted for each diff path.

## Test Plan
- E2E script creates two fixture sessions and runs diff commands.

 {"id":"bd-1sj4","title":"No-mock policy enforcement (denylist/allowlist + CI gate)","description":"## Goal
Enforce a no-mock policy for core modules with automated checks.

## Scope / Subtasks
- Define denylist of mock crates/usages for core modules (collect, inference, decision, plan, action).
- Allowlist in test-only helpers and explicitly mock-friendly modules.
- CI job to fail if denylisted mocks appear in restricted paths.
- Provide lint/test helper to scan for mock usage patterns.
- Document the no-mock policy and exception process.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Denylist/allowlist defined and documented.
- [ ] CI gate fails on forbidden mock usage in core modules.
- [ ] Local check command documented.

## Test Plan
- Unit: policy parser/validator for denylist rules.
- Integration: intentionally introduce mock usage in a fixture and verify CI fails.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-02T20:00:08.269672186Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-03T19:09:16.818654162Z","closed_at":"2026-02-03T19:09:16.818361398Z","close_reason":"Implemented no-mock policy check, docs, CI gate","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1sj4","depends_on_id":"process_triage-aii.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-02T20:00:08.282524208Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
